creator: jedgar@fxp.org
text:
On Sun, 21 May 2000 work@astratel.ru wrote:

> I add string to my kernel config
> pseudo-device           snp        20
> 
> but it doesn't work
> and says me when i type 'watch'
> watch: fatal: cannot open snoop device
> 
> WHat is this? What must i do to fix it?
> 

Make the appropriate snoop device (/dev/snp*)?

-----
